MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-27-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CAROL WANG'S PETITION TO COMPEL MEDIATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE ACTION IS STAYED UNTIL FEBRUARY 1, 2008 WHILE THE PARTIES MEDIATE THE DISPUTE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT REQUIRING MEDIATION THROUGH A.A.A. IF THE PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO AGREE UPON A MEDIATOR. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
